svg.title: CKYC CERSAI Card — Proposed Redesign (Back)
svg.desc: Back side of the proposed redesign of the Central KYC Records Registry card issued by CERSAI, India. Designed by Pt. Prashant Tripathi.

g.text: Securitisation Asset Reconstruction and Security Interest of India
S/O RXX XXXXX TrXXXXXX, XXXXXX WaXX XXXXXXX MoXXXXX,
S/O RXX XXXXX TrXXXXXX, XXXXXX WaXX XXXXXXX MoXXXXX,
To verify this card, visit ckycindia.in/kyc/verify or call 1800-XXX-XXXX (Toll Free). If found, return to nearest bank branch.
CENTRAL KYC RECORDS REGISTRY • CERSAI • GOVT. OF INDIA
